targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, payload->>'no2' AS real_no2, payload->>'predictedNO2' AS pred_no2 FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts
SELECT sqrt(avg(power(((payload->>'no2')::float - (payload->>'predictedNO2')::float),2))) AS rmse FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts >= now() - interval '7 days'
SELECT avg(abs((payload->>'no2')::float - (payload->>'predictedNO2')::float)) AS mae FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts >= now() - interval '7 days'
